The Science of Protein Timing

Protein timing refers to the strategic consumption of protein around workouts to maximize muscle protein synthesis.

Research suggests that consuming 20-40 grams of high-quality protein within 2 hours post-exercise can significantly enhance recovery.

Leucine, found in animal proteins and some plant sources, is particularly important for triggering anabolic pathways.
